title: CNBC Daily Open: Trump is doubling down on rhetoric to end the Iran war
summary_full: Trump has threatened to destroy Iran's oil wells, its export hub of Kharg Island, and power plants if a peace deal is not reached "shortly."
summary_public: Trump has threatened to destroy Iran's oil wells, its export hub of Kharg Island, and power plants if a peace deal is not reached "shortly."

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump has threatened to destroy Iran's oil wells
